title: polypodium excavatum var. asterolepis
intro: Polypodium excavatum var. asterolepis, also known as the American polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polypodium excavatum var. asterolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and crushing the leaves, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
